name: Wyrmwood — Sword in Stone
description: At the western end of the glade stands a flat grey stone. A sword has been driven hilt-deep into it. No rust. No wear. It looks as though it was placed here yesterday.
ambient: The stone emits a low, almost-inaudible hum.
The grass around the stone grows in a perfect circle.

objects.name: sword in stone
objects.description: A longsword buried to the hilt in a flat grey stone. The blade is immaculate. Runes are carved into the stone around the base.
objects.description_snippet: A sword stands upright in a stone at the clearing's western end.

on_interact.look: The blade shows no age and no rust. The runes carved around the base are worn but legible: 'The worthy bear no wicked words.'
on_interact.read: Carved into the stone: 'The worthy bear no wicked words.'
on_interact.take: The sword does not move. Not even slightly. You strain until your arms ache. It will not come.
on_interact.smash: Your blow glances off the blade with a ringing clang that echoes into the wood. The stone does not chip.

interaction_rules.text: You close your eyes and murmur a quiet prayer. For a heartbeat, the room feels still enough to listen.
Your voice drifts through the area and fades into the distance. No one applauds, but it lifts your spirits.
